Figure 5 | Symmetry-protected electronic and magnonic topology. a, Z2 magnetic topological insulators protected by {𝑇‖𝑚556|0} symmetry. Reproduced from ref. 19. b, Opposite-spin (left) and same-spin (right) Weyl points. Reproduced from ref. 138. c, The schematic dispersion of the 12-fold fermion along three high-symmetry lines [100], [110], [111]. Reproduced from ref. 142. d, Statistics of five types of unconventional magnon in the collinear magnets including: (1) chiral quasiparticles (2) topological charge-neutral (C = 0) quasiparticles (3) octuple nodal line magnons; (4) quadruple nodal plane magnons and (5) chiral magnons. Reproduced from ref. 53. e, Magnon band degeneracies within general Heisenberg-Kitaev model (left), Kitaev limit (upper right) and Heisenberg limit (lower right). Reproduced from ref. 20.
